ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auction_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction item */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code representing the item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "info" TEXT /* Additional information about the item such as stats and attributes */,
  "current_bid" TEXT /* Current highest bid on the item */,
  "next_bid" TEXT /* Next bid notification threshold for the item */,
  "seller" TEXT /* Username of the seller offering the item */,
  "starting_bid" TEXT /* The initial bid amount set by the seller */,
  "minimum_bid_increment" TEXT /* The minimum amount by which a bid must exceed the current bid */,
  "auction_start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the auction */,
  "auction_end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the auction */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* The current status of the item (e.g., 'active', 'sold', 'canceled') */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the item */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game ID from which the item originates */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the item's details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  "is_seller" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a seller */,
  "is_buyer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing auction_items */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users */,
  "bid_amount" TEXT /* The amount of the bid */,
  "bid_time" TEXT /* The time the bid was placed */,
  "is_automatic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bid is an automatic bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing auction_items */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'bid_placed', 'auction_ending') */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* The time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* The message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing auction_items */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users (buyer) */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users (seller) */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* The amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* The time the transaction was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the transaction (e.g., 'completed', 'pending', 'canceled') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)
